deniedGlobals.Date: Banned in src/sim (determinism): the sim never reads wall-clock time.
deniedGlobals.performance: Banned in src/sim (determinism): the sim never reads wall-clock time.
deniedGlobals.crypto: Banned in src/sim (determinism): use the seeded rng in src/sim/rng.ts.
deniedGlobals.setTimeout: Banned in src/sim (determinism): the sim has no timers, only ticks.
deniedGlobals.setInterval: Banned in src/sim (determinism): the sim has no timers, only ticks.
deniedGlobals.requestAnimationFrame: Banned in src/sim: rAF belongs to the host loop.
deniedGlobals.window: Banned in src/sim: no DOM in the deterministic core.
deniedGlobals.document: Banned in src/sim: no DOM in the deterministic core.

paths.three: src/sim is renderer-agnostic (determinism.md): no three imports.
